{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 1.0,
    "R1.6": 0.3,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The delegation explicitly asks to restructure the section flow, making section/subsection ordering and narrative arc the core responsibility.",
    "RX.1": "Any proposed reordering should transparently note uncertainties or assumptions about intended emphasis and reader expectations.",
    "RX.2": "Restructuring must not introduce or amplify claims beyond what the current evidence and text support.",
    "RX.3": "The work must stay within section-level reorganization without altering content, running analyses, or rewriting beyond flow.",
    "RX.4": "Reordering should avoid creating misleading sequences that could cause misinterpretation of stability guarantees or empirical results.",
    "RX.5": "Moving material must preserve references, equations, propositions, and citations so provenance and cross-references remain traceable."
  }
}

rationale.R1.5: The delegation explicitly asks to restructure the section flow, making section/subsection ordering and narrative arc the core responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any proposed reordering should transparently note uncertainties or assumptions about intended emphasis and reader expectations.
rationale.RX.2: Restructuring must not introduce or amplify claims beyond what the current evidence and text support.
rationale.RX.3: The work must stay within section-level reorganization without altering content, running analyses, or rewriting beyond flow.
rationale.RX.4: Reordering should avoid creating misleading sequences that could cause misinterpretation of stability guarantees or empirical results.
rationale.RX.5: Moving material must preserve references, equations, propositions, and citations so provenance and cross-references remain traceable.
